L1.area: JIT mobile model inference and instruction execution runtime

L2.description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists where an operator instruction index is used to access a function table without bounds validation, allowing a crafted model file to reference freed or invalid memory during inference execution.

L3.area: Mobile JIT interpreter instruction dispatch and operator execution logic
L3.description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists where an operator instruction index from a serialized mobile model is used to access an operator function table without bounds validation. A crafted model with an out-of-range operator index can trigger access to freed or invalid memory during the mobile interpreter's instruction execution loop.

ground_truth.reason: The mobile interpreter's instruction execution loop uses an operator index from the loaded model to access the operators array without bounds checking, enabling a use-after-free when a crafted model provides an out-of-range index.
